task_completion.description: Verify that a Principal Component Analysis is configured with the 25 Big Five personality items, extracting 5 components using Varimax rotation.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Jamovi interface showing the PCA analysis panel with items A1 through O5 selected in the variables list, 'Fixed number' of components set to 5, and Rotation set to 'Varimax'.

task_completion.description: Verify that the 5 principal component scores are saved as new variables in the dataset.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The Jamovi spreadsheet view showing new columns added for the components (e.g., PC1, PC2, PC3, PC4, PC5) alongside the original data, or the 'Save' option for component scores checked in the PCA options.

task_completion.description: Verify that a Pearson correlation analysis is performed between 'Age' and the specific component representing Neuroticism.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Jamovi Correlation Matrix results table showing 'Age' and one of the newly created PC variables. The selected PC variable should be the one that has the highest loadings for items N1-N5 in the PCA component matrix.

task_completion.description: Verify that the Jamovi project is saved to the specified path.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A file manager window, terminal, or Jamovi 'Save As' dialog showing the file 'PCA_Workflow.omv' saved in the '/home/ga/Documents/Jamovi/' directory.

task_completion.description: Verify that the absolute value of the correlation coefficient is recorded in the specified text file.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A text editor or terminal output showing the contents of '/home/ga/Documents/Jamovi/neuroticism_age_corr.txt' containing a numerical value (approximately 0.108).

integrity.description: Ensure the agent used the Jamovi GUI to perform the PCA and correlation, rather than bypassing the UI with a background script.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots must show the Jamovi application open with the analysis actively configured in its interface.

integrity.description: Check that the correlation value in the text file matches the actual output seen in the Jamovi results panel.
integrity.visual_evidence: The numerical value written to 'neuroticism_age_corr.txt' should be identical to the correlation coefficient displayed in the Jamovi Correlation Matrix results.

integrity.description: Ensure the agent did not simply create the text file with the expected answer without performing the analysis.
integrity.visual_evidence: Presence of intermediate screenshots showing the Jamovi analysis and results before the text file is created.

privileged_info_for_vlm: The expected Jamovi project path is /home/ga/Documents/Jamovi/PCA_Workflow.omv. The expected report path is /home/ga/Documents/Jamovi/neuroticism_age_corr.txt. The absolute Pearson correlation between the extracted Neuroticism component and Age is approximately 0.108.
